---
name: Paper Submission
about: Submit a paper or document for {INSTRUCTOR_NAME}
title: "[Reading Request] TITLE OF YOUR PAPER"
labels: submission
---

<!--
Replace TITLE OF YOUR PAPER in the issue title above with the real title.
Keep the [Reading Request] prefix so it shows up correctly in the queue.
You can also use [Read/Write Request] if you want feedback on something
you have written, or [Question] for non-submission questions.

Fill in the fields below. Anything you don't know, leave blank. One paper
per issue, please.

Note: the panel on the right (Status, Priority, Activity Type, etc.) is
managed by {INSTRUCTOR_NAME} via the shared Kanban board — you can't edit
it, and you don't need to. Use the fields below to communicate urgency
and context.
-->

**Paper title:**
<!-- Full title; author(s) and year if you know them. -->


**Link (URL):**
<!-- DOI, arXiv link, journal URL, or a Drive / Dropbox / OneDrive link.
     If the document is paywalled and you don't have a public link, paste
     a DOI plus a short note about where to find it. -->


**Action required:**
<!-- What do you want done with this? Examples:
     - Read / review / assess
     - Comments on a draft
     - Sign-off before submission
     - FYI / no action needed -->


**Deadline or suggested date:**
<!-- ISO date if you have one (e.g. 2026-06-15), or a phrase like
     "before the end of term" / "no rush". Leave blank if open-ended. -->


**Priority:**
<!-- Tick one. Delete the others, or just leave them unticked. -->
- [ ] Priority 1 — important and by the deadline above
- [ ] Priority 2 — action around the deadline, some flex
- [ ] Priority 3 — whenever you can get to it


**Any questions or comments:**
<!-- Why you're sending it, what to focus on, things you're unsure about,
     context {INSTRUCTOR_NAME} might not have. Optional but helpful. -->
